435 M0900A_PRSR_ULCR_PRIOR_CD M0900A_PRSR_ULCR_PRIOR_CD M0900A Healed Pressure Ulcer Present on Prior Assessment Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether pressure ulcers were present on the prior assessment (OBRA, or Scheduled PPS). -=Not assessed/no information
0=No
1=Yes
^=Blank(skip pattern) discontinued 9/30/2018
